name: 9-Day Tour: Casablanca → Chefchaouen → Tangier → Fes → Sahara → Marrakech

seo.title: 9-Day Casablanca to Marrakech Tour — Chefchaouen, Tangier, Fes, Sahara | Authentic Morocco Tours
seo.description: Private 9-day tour from Casablanca: Chefchaouen, Tangier, back via Fes (guide), Merzouga Sahara, Todra, Dades, Ait Ben Haddou, Marrakech (guide). Our most complete tour.

hero.tagline: The complete grand tour of Morocco in 9 days

intro: This 9-day tour from Casablanca is the most complete in our range: it includes Chefchaouen and Tangier in the north, Fes and its madrasas, the Merzouga desert with the Erg Chebbi dunes, the Todra Gorges, the Dades Valley, Ait Ben Haddou and Marrakech with an official guide. Two local guides included.
